history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Poster ini mengiklankan turnamen Free Fire. Terdapat informasi mengenai prizepool sebesar IDR 120.000, format turnamen "Fast Tour Squad Team" dengan batasan maksimal 12 squad, tanggal pelaksanaan yaitu 22 Juli 2026, biaya pendaftaran sebesar IDR 20.000, serta kontak yang bisa dihubungi yaitu Instagram @official_semuatournament dan nomor WhatsApp 085735885104. Tampilan poster didominasi warna hitam dan emas dengan elemen api yang dramatis, serta logo turnamen "Semua Tournament" yang menampilkan piala.
